title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
choice_data_list: Keep up the good work, okay?
Keep up the good work, okay?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I will. Just looking at this plushie's
adorable face makes me feel stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I know! You should get one for yourself too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the only one with a lot on my plate. I think
you could use some motivation as well.
